channel.title: City Record Digest
channel.description: Notable NYC government notices — procurement, hearings, rules, and more

item.title: Notice of Tobacco Retail Dealer and Electronic Cigarette Retail Dealer License Lottery
item.description:
Special notice from Consumer and Worker Protection: Notice of Tobacco Retail Dealer and Electronic Cigarette Retail Dealer License L.... Special Materials often contain significant policy actions, legal notices, or procurement intents that don't fit standard categories.
Consumer and Worker Protection | Special Materials
